note: All 12 tools and their patterns are enforced by the org coding standard 'rknightion-standard' (id 159741), to which this repo is assigned. Per the operator's guardrails, repo-level tool/pattern changes (which would 409-conflict and require unlinking the standard) were intentionally NOT made. The only repo-local noise-reduction lever applied is path exclusion via .codacy.yaml.

noisyButKept: Trivy dependency vulnerabilities on uv.lock (11 issues) kept — legitimate security signal, not excluded.

keyImprovements: Added repo-local .codacy.yaml excluding docs/**, tests/** (incl. nested **/tests/**), vendor/**, and generated/ paths — matching the cross-repo convention.
Excludes ~19 of 40 current Cloud issues that originate in docs/ and test code, leaving first-party source and dependency-security findings as the high-signal remainder.
Left tool/pattern selection to the org standard 'rknightion-standard' as instructed; no standard changes, no repo unassignment.
